items.title: Safety First: Reassessing Fuel Dispensing And Border Trade Oversight — Dr Theva Raj Ponnudurai & Dr Musa Mohd Nordin
items.summary: The sight of plastic containers filled with petrol being transported in private vehicles is alarming. In the current scorching heat, each such container effectively becomes a potential firebomb. The post Safety First: Reassessing Fuel Dispensing And Border Trade Oversight — Dr Theva Raj Ponnudurai & Dr Musa Mohd Nordin appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Beyond Fake MCs: A Call To Rebuild Trust In Malaysia’s Medical Leave System — Dr Raymond Choy
items.summary: The scale of MC misuse highlighted in recent reports should not only be seen as a compliance concern, but as a catalyst for reform. The post Beyond Fake MCs: A Call To Rebuild Trust In Malaysia’s Medical Leave System — Dr Raymond Choy appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Dzulkefly Highlights ‘Extremely Critical’ Cardiologist Shortage In Sabah
items.summary: Sabah has 8 cardiologists (3 in HQE II and 5 in private), resulting in a 1:467,500 cardiologist to population ratio, which Dr Dzul described as "very critical" compared to the 1:35,000 target ratio. Ratio is 1:1,246,667 if only MOH cardiologists counted. The post Dzulkefly Highlights ‘Extremely Critical’ Cardiologist Shortage In Sabah appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Imbalanced Medical Officer Distribution Between Segamat Hospital And Klinik Kesihatan — Medical Officer
items.summary: A doctor highlights a maldistribution of MOs between Segamat Hospital and KKs that's putting tremendous pressure on Segamat Hospital's emergency unit with only 13 MOs (set to drop to 11 due to resignations). MOs in emergency work 12-14 hours almost daily. The post Imbalanced Medical Officer Distribution Between Segamat Hospital And Klinik Kesihatan — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: How Mathematical Modelling Can Save Lives Of TB Patients
items.summary: By using real world data, mathematical models can help policymakers reach patients who would benefit most from an intervention, and better identify their needs. The post How Mathematical Modelling Can Save Lives Of TB Patients appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysian Private Hospitals Still Have Medicine Supply: APHM
items.summary: APHM says private hospitals in Malaysia have yet to face drug supply disruptions, adding that it will monitor any indications of a significant increase in the cost of medicines and medical consumables that may arise during the West Asia conflict. The post Malaysian Private Hospitals Still Have Medicine Supply: APHM appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Only Two MRI Machines At HKL — Patient
items.summary: A patient says HKL only has two MRI machines that can handle 25 patients maximum daily, but more than 40 patients are given appointments in a day. HKL outsourced patients to private hospitals last year for MRI tests, but this wasn't done this year. The post Only Two MRI Machines At HKL — Patient appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Delay In SWE Certification, NSR Registration Process — Senior Medical Officer
items.summary: We were informed by MOH's medical development division that the document verification process alone for SWE certification may take 6-8 months. Only then can candidates proceed with NSR registration, which itself may require additional processing time. The post Delay In SWE Certification, NSR Registration Process — Senior Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Russia Halts Some Nitrogen Fertiliser Exports, Russia Is Malaysia’s Top Imported Fertiliser Origin
items.summary: Russia has suspended ammonium nitrate fertiliser exports until April 21, after China similarly curbed fertiliser exports. Russia and China are Malaysia's two biggest sources of imported fertilisers. KPKM has yet to address Malaysia's fertiliser situation. The post Russia Halts Some Nitrogen Fertiliser Exports, Russia Is Malaysia’s Top Imported Fertiliser Origin appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Understanding The UK Meningitis B Outbreak — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Husna Musa & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: We must push for the licensing of the MenB vaccine to ensure Malaysia is protected against this devastating but preventable disease. The post Understanding The UK Meningitis B Outbreak — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Husna Musa & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .
